title: Protocol for amplification of three DNA regions from Nephila clavipes (Araneae: Araneidae).
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6rb7u","text":"Protocol for amplification of the mitochondrial gene \"Citocrome Oxidase I\" and the nuclear genes \"subunit a from the Histone 3\" and \"Internal Transcribed Spacer 2\" from Nephila clavipes (Araneae: Araneidae).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":169,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"du7qk","text":"Mitochondrial gene Citochrome Oxidase I (COI)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":45}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9bphs","text":"Primers: LCO1490 and HCO2198","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cujuc","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"16pga","text":"Reference: Folmer, O., Black, M., Hoeh, W., Lutz, R., Vrijenhoek, R. (1994) DNA primers for amplification of mitochondrial cytochrome c oxidase subunit I from diverse metazoan invertebrates. Molecular Marine Biology and Biotechnology, 3(5), 294–299.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":191,"length":42},{"style":"bold","offset":235,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dpore","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7ve8t","text":"PCR Reaction: 1μL of template DNA, 1U of Taq DNA Polymerase (Thermo-Fisher), 2.5μL of 10X KCl Buffer (Thermo-Fisher), 2.8μL of 25mM MgCl2 (Thermo-Fisher), 1μL of 10mM dNTP mix (GE Healthcare), 0.5μL of each forward and reverse primer 10μM, and ddH2O to the volume of 25μL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":136,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":247,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ameo5","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7gpde","text":"PCR cycling: a denaturation step of 3 min at 94ºC, 30 cycles of a denaturation step at 94ºC for 45s, an annealing step at 51ºC for 45s and an extension step at 72ºC for 2 min, and a final extension step at 72ºC for 3 min.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5232l","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"41di7","text":"Nuclear gene for the subunit a of the Histone 3 (H3a)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":53}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"35eaq","text":"Primers: H3aF2 and H3aR2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"10nah","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bnncm","text":"Reference: Colgan, D.J., McLauchlan, A., Wilson, G.D.F. et al. (1998) Histone H3 and U2 snRNA DNA sequences and arthropod molecular evolution. Australian Journal of Zoology, 46, 419–437.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":56,"length":5},{"style":"italic","offset":143,"length":29},{"style":"bold","offset":174,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3k4l4","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ads5i","text":"PCR Reaction: 1μL of template DNA, 1U of Taq DNA Polymerase (Thermo-Fisher), 2.5μL of 10X KCl Buffer (Thermo-Fisher), 2.3μL of 25mM MgCl2 (Thermo-Fisher), 0.5μL of 10mM dNTP mix (GE Healthcare), 0.5μL of each forward and reverse primer 10μM, and ddH2O to the volume of 25μL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":136,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":249,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bdrrq","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4e8b5","text":"PCR cycling: a denaturation step of 3-4 min at 94ºC, 30 cycles of a denaturation step at 94ºC for 45s, an annealing step at 46ºC for 1 min and an extension step at 72ºC for 1 min, and a final extension step at 72ºC for 10 min.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2tpvm","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"914ac","text":"Nuclear intron internal transcribed spacer 2 (ITS2)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":51}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4jii1","text":"Primers: 5.8S and ITS4","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4suif","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"35lgq","text":"Reference: White, T.J., Bruns, T., Lee, S., Taylor, J. (1990) Amplification and direct sequencing of fungal ribosomal RNA genes for phylogenetics. In: Innis MA, Gelfand DH, Sninsky JJ, et al., eds. PCR Protocols: A Guide to Methods and Applications. New York: Academic Press, 315–322.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":185,"length":5},{"style":"italic","offset":198,"length":50}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f3op3","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7r4s4","text":"PCR Reaction: 1μL of template DNA, 1U of Taq DNA Polymerase (Thermo-Fisher), 2.5μL of 10X KCl Buffer (Thermo-Fisher), 3.5μL of 25mM MgCl2 (Thermo-Fisher), 0.5μL of 10mM dNTP mix (GE Healthcare), 0.4μL of each forward and reverse primer 10μM, and ddH2O to the volume of 25μL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":136,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":249,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"30k5","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ch6","text":"PCR cycling: a denaturation step of 4 min at 95ºC, 30 cycles of a denaturation step at 95ºC for 45s, an annealing step at 61ºC for 45s and an extension step at 72ºC for 2 min, and a final extension step at 72ºC for 10 min.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Luiz Filipe Bartoleti
